summary: Refactored WorkVideoController into a thin HTTP-to-command mapper with application/media command records, Spring service handlers, and a JDBC-backed WorkVideoStore for upload-session persistence.
intentionally_not_changed: Endpoint paths and JSON response shapes

validations.result: failed before compilation because the host JDK is Java 17 and the backend requires Java 21

validations.command: DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/codex-docker-config docker run --rm --user 1000:1000 -e MAVEN_CONFIG=/tmp/.m2 -v /home/kimwoonggon/.m2:/tmp/.m2 -v /mnt/d/woong-blog-springboot-nextjs:/workspace -w /workspace/backend maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 ./mvnw -q -Dtest=WorkVideoCommandHandlersTest test

DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/codex-docker-config docker run --rm --user 1000:1000 --network wb-spring-test -e MAVEN_CONFIG=/tmp/.m2 -e SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL=jdbc:postgresql://wb-spring-test-db:5432/portfolio -e SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME=portfolio -e SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD=portfolio -v /home/kimwoonggon/.m2:/tmp/.m2 -v /mnt/d/woong-blog-springboot-nextjs:/workspace -w /workspace/backend maven:3.9-eclipse-temurin-21 ./mvnw -q -Dproject.build.directory=/tmp/wb-work-video-cqrs-target-20260517 -Dtestcontainers.enabled=false -Dtest=BackendApplicationTests,WorkVideoCommandHandlersTest test

risks: HLS remains a deterministic compatibility implementation, not full transcoding.
Host Maven verification requires Java 21; Docker was used because the host JDK is Java 17.
Shared backend/target can be affected by concurrent workers; final context verification used an isolated /tmp build directory.
recommendation: Accept the work-video/media CQRS refactor and run broader compose/API smoke checks after the rest of the backend slices settle.
